dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 1098 RH: To reauthorize the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Scholten (for herself and Mr. Yakym) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on February 6, 2025

form.official-title: To reauthorize the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994.

section.header: Reauthorization of Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994

subsection.text: Section 5 of the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994 (16 U.S.C. 719b–1) is amended—

paragraph.text: by inserting and after Guam,; and
by striking , and any other territory or possession after Virgin Islands.

subsection.text: Section 6 of the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994 (16 U.S.C. 719c) is amended in subsection (a) by striking 2006 through 2010 and inserting 2025 through 2031.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
